title: Harvesting Vision
description: Adds and outline to indicate whether a crop has fully matured.
body:
Stop inspecting your crops. Harvesting Vision is a client-side utility that draws an outline around fully grown crops. It works on Wheat, Carrots, Potatoes, Beetroots, Nether Wart, Cocoa Beans, and even Modded Crops automatically! 

# The GUI 
![This is the Main page of the GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c5158f2f2308e5b8c835d692d09209f7020714.png)

# The Crops Filter 
![The Crops Filter page of the GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6191c52f60ffc98c4d4b249448ae7002cb8ef70a.png)
